	}

	level			town

; >>>> start of diplomacy section <<<<
;core_attitudes: faction stance to another at the beginning of the campaign -50 (allied) to 600 (at war)
;faction_relationships: the relationship of factions at the start of the campaign
;faction_agression how aggressive a faction becomes to another after turn1 -200 (friendly) to 700 (at war. hostile)


;Allied
core_attitudes	romans_julii,	0	issa
core_attitudes	romans_julii,	0	emporion
core_attitudes	romans_julii,	0	massalia

core_attitudes	romans_julii,	-10	roman_senate

;;new superfaction definition
superfaction_setup roman_senate

;;defines who this superfaction will be hostile to by default
default_hostile slave
;;don't like the factions we're supposed to have our minions attack
default_hostile carthage
default_hostile epirus
default_hostile antigonid
default_hostile syracuse
default_hostile arverni


;;mission queues, allows you to give factions a specific track of missions
;;the mission must ALWAYS be preceeded by the reward or penalty for completing the mission and the amount of turns the player should be given to complete that mission

;;reward/penalty types:
;;outlaw
;;censor_investigates_family
;;censor_investigates_faction
;;quaestor_investigates_for_corruption
;;quaestor_investigates_for_financial_irregularities
;;quaestor_investigates_for_accounting_irregularities
;;senate_displeasure
;;secret_information_exposure
;;offices_witheld
;;major_exotic_unit
;;two_minor_exotic_units
;;two_best_buildable_units
;;one_best_buildable_unit
;;one_minor_exotic_unit
;;one_buildable_unit
;;major_reward
;;moderate_reward
;;minor_reward
;;promise_of_appointment
;;senate_gratitude
;;throw_games
;;one_triarii
;;two_triarii

;;mission types:
;; Help_Player
;; Demand_Suicide
;; Blockade_Port <settlement>
;; Assassinate <character name>
;; Exact_Tribute <faction name>
;; Subjugate <faction name>
;; Get_Map_Info <faction name>
;; Make_Trade_Agreement <faction name>
;; Declare_War <faction name>
;; Take_City <settlement>

;;Claudii first mission should be to capture Asculum
mission_queue romans_julii
{
	major_reward 5 Take_City Asculum
}
;;Aemilii first mission should be to capture Brundisium
mission_queue roman_rebels_1
{
	major_reward 5 Take_City Brundisium
}
;;Cornelii first mission should be to capture Rhegion
mission_queue roman_rebels_2
{
	major_reward 5 Take_City Rhegium
}


;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;
